data.subject: CRITICAL: Production database connection errors
data.textBody:
Team,

We're seeing intermittent database connection errors in production since the 2am deploy. Error rate has spiked to 5% of all requests.

Error: "FATAL: too many connections for role 'app_user'"

Affected services:
- User API (primary)
- Search service
- Notification worker

I've temporarily increased the connection pool max from 20 to 50 but this is a band-aid. We need to investigate the root cause immediately.

Grafana dashboard: https://grafana.internal/d/db-connections
Deploy log: https://deploys.internal/2026-04-06-0200

— Isabella
